research_note.summary: The first admitted chunked/source-grounding live pilot completed one DeepSeek V4 Flash call and produced protocol-valid proposal-only export records. The output reached the configured output-token cap before complete JSON parsing, so this run is a bounded negative result for prompt/output sizing as well as a live-recording proof.
what_worked: The admitted provider/model/config produced output in one non-streaming batch on the same source excerpt and benchmark as long_context_judgment_live_pilot_001.
The raw source excerpt, prompt trace, provider request/response, and model trace remained in ignored local paths.
The committed records can carry model, prompt, source-hash, token, cost, trace-storage, and truncation metadata without committing raw source or provider payloads.
what_failed: No method success is claimed; method quality was not evaluated by this boundary review.
The response reached the configured output-token cap and did not parse as complete JSON.
The committed record intentionally does not expose the full raw model output, so content-level review remains a future evaluation task.
negative_results: The chunked/source-grounded prompt likely asks for too much structured output under the current output-token cap.
A provider response that contains expected section names is still not a valid artifact when the JSON is incomplete.
A successful provider call is not validation, strategy evidence, product evidence, financial advice, live-trading authority, or architecture.
reusable_by_other_labs: Compare this run with long_context_judgment_live_pilot_001 only after manual content review records exist for both methods.
Keep chunked/source-grounded output schemas compact enough to fit the admitted output cap or explicitly admit a different cap before rerunning.
Use proposal-only live records with explicit source hashes, prompt/config hashes, token/cost metadata, and trace-storage boundaries.
do_not_repeat: Do not retry or expand output caps silently after a truncation.
Do not treat section-name detection as complete JSON parsing.
Do not copy generated synthesis metrics or raw model text into currentness docs.
Do not substitute models silently when the admitted model is unavailable.
research_note.evidence_disclaimer: This is a proposal-only live LLM pilot record, not validation, product evidence, strategy evidence, financial advice, live-trading authority, or architecture.
